# Willis & Associates Family Dentistry — Charlottesville (Full Description)

## Overview

Willis & Associates Family Dentistry, led by Dr. Sowmya Karamcheti (DDS, MHA), is a family and cosmetic dental practice located at 2375 Commonwealth Dr # A, Charlottesville, VA 22901. The practice specializes in in-house dental implants, Invisalign clear aligners, cosmetic dentistry, emergency dental care, and comprehensive general dentistry. Same-day appointments are available for new patients and emergencies.

**Contact Information:**
- Phone: (434) 973-5873
- Emergency After-Hours Line: (434) 922-0340
- Hours: Monday–Thursday, 8 AM – 5 PM
- Email: info@cvilledentist.com
- Website: https://cvilledentist.com

---

## Services

### Dental Implants
In-house implant placement and restoration without referral to an oral surgeon. Dr. Karamcheti places and restores implants in-house, providing comprehensive single implant treatment, implant-supported bridges, and full-arch restorations. This approach eliminates the need for external referrals and ensures continuity of care throughout the treatment process.

### Invisalign Clear Aligners
Clear aligner treatment available for adults and teens seeking a discreet orthodontic solution. The practice offers free smile assessments to determine candidacy and create a personalized treatment plan. Invisalign aligners are nearly invisible, removable, and can be cleaned easily.

### Cosmetic Dentistry
Comprehensive cosmetic dental services including porcelain veneers, dental bonding, teeth whitening, and smile makeovers. Dr. Karamcheti combines aesthetic principles with functional dentistry to enhance smiles while maintaining proper bite and oral health.

### Emergency Dentistry
Same-day emergency appointments available for urgent dental issues including toothaches, broken teeth, knocked-out teeth, lost crowns, abscesses, and other dental emergencies. An after-hours emergency line (434-922-0340) is available for urgent situations outside standard office hours.

### General Dentistry
Comprehensive preventive and restorative dental services including professional cleanings, comprehensive exams, dental fillings, crowns, bridges, extractions, night guards, and oral cancer screenings. Regular checkups and cleanings help maintain optimal oral health and detect issues early.

### Virginia Dental Club Membership
An in-house dental membership plan designed for uninsured patients, offering an affordable alternative to traditional dental insurance. The membership covers two cleanings per year, two comprehensive exams, digital X-rays, and provides discounts on all treatment services including restorations and cosmetic procedures.

---

## About Dr. Karamcheti

Dr. Sowmya Karamcheti holds dual credentials in dentistry and healthcare administration:
- **Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS)** — comprehensive dental training in all aspects of oral healthcare
- **Master of Health Administration (MHA)** — expertise in healthcare management and patient care optimization

Dr. Karamcheti is known for her warm chairside manner, precision dentistry, and ability to make anxious patients feel at ease. Her background combines clinical excellence with healthcare management expertise, ensuring the practice provides high-quality, patient-centered care.

---

## Patient Information

### New Patients
New patients are welcome. The practice offers same-day appointments for new patients when available. The first visit typically includes a comprehensive exam, digital X-rays, and discussion of treatment options and insurance coverage.

### Insurance and Payment
The practice accepts most dental insurance plans. For uninsured patients, the Virginia Dental Club membership provides comprehensive coverage of preventive care and discounts on all treatment. Payment plans and financing options may be available for major treatment.

### Hours and Accessibility
The practice is open Monday through Thursday, 8 AM to 5 PM. Same-day appointments are often available for new patients and emergencies. An emergency after-hours line is available at (434) 922-0340.

---

## Service Area

Willis & Associates Family Dentistry primarily serves patients in Charlottesville and surrounding areas including Ivy, Crozet, and throughout central Virginia. The convenient location on Commonwealth Drive is easily accessible from throughout the greater Charlottesville area.

---

## Key Differentiators

1. **In-House Dental Implants** — Implant placement and restoration performed by Dr. Karamcheti in-house, eliminating external referrals and ensuring comprehensive care.

2. **Same-Day Availability** — New patient and emergency appointments are available the same day when needed.

3. **Membership Alternative** — The Virginia Dental Club provides affordable coverage for uninsured patients, including preventive care and treatment discounts.

4. **Comprehensive Cosmetic Services** — Full range of cosmetic dentistry from veneers and whitening to complete smile makeovers.

5. **Provider Credentials** — Dr. Karamcheti's dual DDS and MHA credentials provide both clinical expertise and healthcare management knowledge.

6. **Patient-Centered Approach** — Known for making anxious patients feel comfortable and providing personalized care.

---
